posts.text: If you choose to look at the FACTS behind the origins of @plannedparenthood you’d realize why so many of us are pushing for it to be defunded. Abortion is NOT healthcare. Facts over feelings. Thanks again to @kristanmercerhawkins for all she does to help save babies, and mothers. 🙏🏽
